action.description: The committee on WAL recommend that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS. The votes were as follows: 7 Ayes: Representative(s) Hashem, Morikawa, Ichiyama, Woodson, Shimizu, Souza; Ayes with reservations: Representative(s) Poepoe; 1 Noes: Representative(s) Iwamoto; and 1 Excused: Representative(s) Belatti.
